report.notes: vrchat.com world pages are JS-rendered SPAs returning empty HTML to WebFetch. en.vrcw.net failed SSL cert verification. Verification gate satisfied via vrclist.com fetches + dual-source search corroboration for VRChat launch URLs. UUIDs surfaced from search engine title/URL extraction only — never invented.
